zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley於1344年之前出生在英國瓦維其可爾艾斯利時，他的父親Thomas Astley11340歲，母親Elizabeth de Beauchamp38歲。他於1361年與Joan de Willoughby在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1404年10月18日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley于1344年之前出生在英国瓦維其可爾艾斯利时，他的父亲Thomas Astley11340岁，母亲Elizabeth de Beauchamp38岁。他于1361年与Joan de Willoughby在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1404年10月18日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Astley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in England called Astley (in Lancashire, Shropshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Yorkshire), from Old English ēast ‘east’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The modern surname seems to be particularly associated with the one in Warwickshire. See also Astle .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley was born before 1344, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, his father, Thomas Astley, was 11340 and his mother, Elizabeth de Beauchamp, was 38. He married Joan de Willoughby in 1361, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 18 October 1404, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley est né avant 1344, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Astley, avait 11340 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Beauchamp, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Willoughby en 1361, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1404, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley vor 1344 in Astley, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Astley 11340 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Beauchamp 38. Er hat 1361 in Lincolnshire, England Joan de Willoughby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1404 in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley è nato il prima del 1344 nel Astley, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Astley, aveva 11340 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Beauchamp, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Willoughby nel 1361, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 ottobre 1404, nel Astley, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astleyが1344年以前にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Astleyは11340歳，母Elizabeth de Beauchampは38歳であった。1361年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでJoan de Willoughbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1404年10月18日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley(이)가 1344년 이전 영국 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Astley(은)는 11340세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Beauchamp(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1361년 영국 링코실르에서 Joan de Willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 10월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley nasceu antes 1344, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Astley, tinha 11340 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Beauchamp, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Willoughby em 1361, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1404, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley родился перед 1344 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Astley было 11340 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Beauchamp, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Willoughby в 1361 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 октября 1404 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Astley 4th Baron Astley nació antes de 1344, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Astley, tenía 11340 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Beauchamp, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Joan de Willoughby en 1361, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1404, en Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
